request.feedback: string (optional rejection reason / instructions for improvement)

description: Gate 2 rejection: marks script as rejected with optional feedback. The user can later trigger refinement or full regeneration. Synchronous — returns immediately with result.

sync_steps.name: Log rejection
sync_steps.action: POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { project_id, topic_id, stage: 'script_review', action: 'rejected', details: { feedback } }

error_handling.on_supabase_write_error: Return { success: false, error: 'Failed to update topic status' } with HTTP 500
error_handling.on_topic_not_found: Return { success: false, error: 'Topic not found' } with HTTP 404

notes: Rejection does not delete the script — it remains viewable in Script Review page.
User can trigger /webhook/script/refine after rejection to improve the script.
User can trigger /webhook/script/generate again for a full re-generation (increments script_attempts).
The feedback field is stored for reference and can be shown in refinement history.
